title: senecio modestus var. candollei
intro: Senecio modestus var. candollei, also known as Candolle's ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The health benefits of Senecio modestus var. candollei include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
